ideation: This animation sequence simulates a snowboarder's arm movements.  The arms are positioned to mimic the balance and motion required for snowboarding.  The sequence emphasizes the dynamic nature of the sport and the slight shifts in balance required to maintain control. Frame 1 shows a balanced starting posture, Frame 2 depicts the beginning of a turn, Frame 3 captures the peak of the turn, and Frame 4 shows the return to a balanced posture. Frame 5 depicts a relaxed posture after the run.

frames.beat: arms balance slightly out, ready to ride
arms extend, initiating a carve to the left
arms sweep wide in a deep, controlled turn
arms pull back, balancing the return carve
arms rest, the snowboard run is complete
